zZLoopingRunner class is a component which orchestrates the looping
execution of functions.

z.Schedule the next iteration of a looping call.)

	threading

	setDaemon

	Exceptionr
looping_callZ

	_schedule0
LoopingRunner._schedulec
Timerr&

timerr
LoopingRunner.startN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r
	metaclassc
A callable looping call.
    It is retried for the given number of times, and the interval
    between the retries is incremented until max interval is reached.
    If the max retry count is set to -1, then the it is invoked
    indefinitely until an exception is thrown, and the caught
    exception is not in the list of suggested exceptions.
    Exception would not be raised to caller.
    Max running interval should not beyond one day.
    c
Configure the looping call object using the input params.
        :param max_retry_count: maximum number of times the given function must
                                be retried when one of the input 'exceptions'
                                is caught. When set to -1, it will be retried
                                indefinitely until an exception is thrown
                                and the caught exception is not in param
                                exceptions.
        :interval: time in seconds between retries
        :param inc_interval: incremental time in seconds for interval
                             between retries
        :param max_interval: max interval in seconds beyond which the interval
                             will not be incremented using param
                             inc_interval. On reaching this threshold,
                             max_interval will be used as the interval.
        :param exceptions: suggested exceptions for which the function must be
                           retried, if no exceptions are provided (the default)
                           then no retrying will be triggered.
        :param spawning_thread: indicate that not using thread pool but spawning
                                thread on the fly, espacially not suggesting to
                                use it that maybe lead to resource leaking.
        Z
max_retry_count
interval
inc_intervalr
max_intervalN
exceptionsr
funcr
kwargs
_max_retry_count
	_interval
_inc_interval
_max_interval
_exceptionsr
_retry_countr
runner)
LoopingCall.__init__c

retryr.
z_Cannot retry function upon suggested exception since retry count %d reached max retry count %d.
